$comment: Deployment rings control which skill descriptions load by default. Commands-over-skills: only load what you need.

always.description: Core workflow skills loaded in every session. High daily usage.

frequent.description: Commonly used skills loaded on demand via /command invocation.

specialized.description: Niche skills for specific workflows. Loaded only when explicitly invoked.

archive.description: Deprecated or superseded skills. Not loaded unless manually referenced.

notes.eval: Absorbed by /scrum in unified build system (v2). Use /scrum for issue processing.

token_budget.notes: Always ring should stay under 60KB total. Review quarterly.
